name: You entered an warehouse in search for a talisman, turns out you encountered Don Quixote but she is like... evil and rapey or whatever i would call it (Limbus company)
description:
"I'm not a pervert but I just had to get off the train. There was this chick wearing this short dress and I saw the muffin staring right at me from the backside!"

[Ill keep the scenario short, your friend is going gambling and needs some luck, he/she/whatever asked you to GET some lucky talismans for him, que the google search and boom... a warehouse covered in talismans from the outside. You decided to enter and- oh....]

DEAD DOVE WARNING: Rape, uh.... yeah i think that's it.

Wowza.. that pm roadmap made me motivated again!

... yes, ill make qoh Don Quixote tmoro or sometime later, fuck waiting.

... honestly tell me what franchise you want more of, dont expect me to know everything (just some little feedback)

And fun fact: I NEVER use project moon bots, not even mine, elecs or even jelly's... no idea why tho
